# The Amlan Laundry

> A transformative, low-investment laundry franchise and Self-Income Generating Program (SIGP) in West Bengal, India.

See also:
- [Full Business Details & Copy Brief](/llms-full.txt) - Comprehensive structured dataset for detailed AI ingestion.

The Amlan Laundry is committed to strengthening local economies, modernizing the fabric care craft, and empowering individuals to achieve financial independence. We unite generations of traditional mastery in fabric care with cutting-edge commercial laundry technology.

## Core Coordinates

- **Brand Name**: The Amlan Laundry
- **Location**: 55, Shyamnagar Road, Kolkata, West Bengal, Pin - 700055, India
- **Phone**: +91 7044428460
- **Email**: contact@theamlanlaundry.com
- **Website**: https://www.theamlanlaundry.com/
- **Social Media**:
  - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61587104255575
  - Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_amlan_laundry/
  - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-amlan-laundry

## Franchise Model

The Amlan Laundry offers a low-investment, high-return franchise setup. We provide:
- Complete business setup
- Store design
- Branding name and identity
- Advanced commercial laundry equipment
- Complete training & skilled staff
- Marketing and digital marketing support
- Ongoing guidance and mentorship

## Training and Skill Development

Our comprehensive training program covers the following modules:
1. **Equipment Operations**: Operation, troubleshooting, and routine maintenance of commercial laundry equipment.
2. **Fabric Handling**: Advanced fabric handling techniques and professional stain removal methods.
3. **Workflow Management**: End-to-end workflow management for efficient daily operations.
4. **Safety & Quality**: Hygiene protocols, safety compliance, and quality assurance frameworks.
5. **Business Sustainability**: Customer service excellence, strategic pricing models, pricing strategies, and profit optimization methods.
6. **Customer Relations**: How to handle customers and build relationships.

## Equipment Fleet

We equip our franchise partners with state-of-the-art commercial laundry systems from LG, designed for efficiency, durability, and superior fabric care:
- **LG Commercial Washer**: Professional Direct Drive technology with a coin-operated system, optimized for high-volume operations.
- **LG 10kg Dryer**: Compact yet powerful commercial dryer with advanced sensor technology.
- **LG Titan 15kg**: Maximum capacity electric dryer for high-volume commercial use.
- **LG Gas Dryer**: Cost-effective gas-powered solution delivering consistent performance and lower operating costs.

## Who Can Join

No prior experience is required to join the program. We welcome:
- **Traditional dhobi families**: Modernizing traditional skills with professional equipment.
- **Women / Homemakers**: Flexible hours fitting family responsibilities to achieve financial independence.
- **Differently-abled individuals**: Equal opportunities provided with specialized training and accessible equipment.
- **Unemployed youth**: Starting an entrepreneurial journey with complete support and valuable skill sets.
- **Aspiring small business owners**: Low-investment business opportunity with ongoing mentorship.

## CSR & Government Partnerships

We actively partner with:
- Corporate CSR programs
- Banks
- Government self-employment schemes
- Skill development initiatives

Through these partnerships, financial assistance and training are made available to eligible candidates.
